💼 LinkedIn Profile ⌨️ GitHub Profile ⬇ Download Resume

A developer who doesn't just write code — he argues for it, builds it, and ships it.

I'm a 3rd-year Computer Science student at Lovely Professional University, building full-stack applications that solve real problems. My focus is the MERN stack, complemented by PHP, MySQL, and real-time technologies like WebSockets.

What sets me apart: I've stood at the podium of the Rajasthan Vidhan Sabha to deliver a speech, and I've won debate championships at LPU's Spectra competition. I bring that same clarity of thought and structured communication to every line of code I write.

Currently deepening my foundations in DSA using Java, while shipping production-grade projects and looking for internship opportunities where I can grow fast.

Mental Health Tracker & Therapy Booking Platform

Feb 2025 – Aug 2025

AI Chatbot for Poem Generation

A full-stack Generative AI platform powered by Google Gemini-2.0 API that creates creative poems on demand. Features dark/light mode, smooth scroll animations, and secure API credential management.

+30%increase in creative output variety vs standard template-based models
+45%user engagement boost via responsive UI with dark/light mode and smooth animations
100%API exposure risk eliminated via .env configuration and environment variables
